positive: Minimalist geometric celestial scene, featuring a stylized crescent moon cradling a vibrant, glowing cluster of abstract nebulae and twinkling stars. The design should be high-contrast and monochromatic, utilizing deep midnight blues, electric teal, and accents of luminous gold. The composition must be perfectly centered, emphasizing clean, sharp silhouettes for printing. Include repeating, subtle geometric constellations along the border area for seamless placement on clothing. Vector art style, highly detailed, crisp lines, designed for apparel transfer, clean black outlines, perfect symmetry, cosmic fantasy, cosmic minimalist
